title: December 2025 CRM Market Manipulation Timeline
description: Forensic reconstruction of coordinated price suppression and network loading operations during December 2025. This phase established the zero-cost basis positions later extracted in March 2026.

events.title: Pre-Mega-Dump Bleed
events.description: BKLBtcJQJ2 executes preliminary sell of 90,253 CRM for 0.100 SOL (~$9) - testing liquidity before main operation
events.legal_significance: Demonstrates premeditation and test-run behavior before main manipulation event

events.title: THE MEGA-DUMP: Birth Suppression Event
events.description: BKLBtcJQJ2 executes largest single CRM sell event found in investigation. 41,089,529 CRM dumped in single transaction, extracting 24.44 SOL (~$2,200) and crashing price to new lows. This was the original price suppression event that prevented CRM from ever running properly after launch.
events.price_impact: Crashed chart to new low - prevented organic price discovery

evidence.pattern: Allocation-based dump - wallet received 36.7M Nov 27 for free

events.legal_significance: Market manipulation using pre-acquired allocation. Wallet received free allocation Nov 27, dumped 41M Dec 8 (net 4M more via accumulation), extracted $2,200, left network bags intact for March extraction.
events.status: Completed mega-dump, wallet now empty (fully exited)

events.title: CRASH AND LOAD: Coordinated Reload at Suppressed Price
events.description: 67 minutes after BKLBtcJQJ2 mega-dump crashed price, HPVUJGJwJ receives 17.4M CRM via dust-fee transfers at artificially suppressed price. Textbook coordinated market manipulation: ARM A dumps to suppress price, ARM B accumulates at suppressed price. Both arms controlled by same operator.

evidence.note: HPVUJGJwJ is NOT retail buyer - it's reload wallet receiving CRM at artificially suppressed price

events.legal_significance: Clear wash trading pattern - coordinated dump and immediate reload at suppressed price constitutes market manipulation
events.current_status: Holds 22,015,172 CRM (2.20% supply) as of investigation date

events.title: Post-Dump Cleanup
events.description: BKLBtcJQJ2 executes final cleanup sell of 12,280 CRM following Dec 8 mega-dump
events.legal_significance: Final extraction from wallet before abandoning

events.title: Staging Operations: EQ2E92SS Receipt
events.description: EQ2E92SS receives 5M CRM from CNSob1L - beginning of staging operations for later routing to dump infrastructure

evidence.future_activity: Will route 9M CRM to dump infrastructure Jan 7-17, 2026

events.legal_significance: Staging wallet that received CRM and forwarded it into dump infrastructure

events.title: Circular Consolidation: D9ZGRMhmdM Operations
events.description: D9ZGRMhmdM executes circular transfers indicating consolidation staging. Sends 592,613 CRM to ARu4n5mFdZog + HLnpSz9h as partial return to feeder network.
events.legal_significance: Evidence of coordinated network rebalancing - satellite wallets returning funds to central feeder

events.title: THE LOADING PHASE BEGINS: HLnpSz9h → 8eVZa7
events.description: Beginning of 4-day mechanized loading operation. HLnpSz9h (THE FEEDER) begins batch-transferring CRM to 8eVZa7 via 30+ internal transfers using dust fees only. This establishes the zero-cost basis position for March 2026 extraction.
events.fee_pattern: 0.0020 SOL per transfer (DUST = NOT market buys = FREE)

evidence.pattern: Exact same 'feeder wallet' methodology used in DojAziGhp distributions
evidence.significance: Creates zero-cost basis position for later extraction

events.legal_significance: Free internal transfers establishing pre-loaded dump position. Not market purchases - evidence of insider allocation rather than organic investment.

events.title: LOADING PHASE COMPLETE: 8eVZa7 Fully Armed
events.description: HLnpSz9h completes loading 8eVZa7 with ~20-22M CRM via 30+ internal transfers. Each transfer returns only 0.0020 SOL (dust fees) = NOT market buys = FREE internal transfers. Total cost basis to 8eVZa7: ~$0. Same day, 8eVZa7 begins downstream distribution to 7abBmGf4.
events.transfer_pattern: Each: 0.0020 SOL back = DUST = NOT market buys = FREE

evidence.pattern: DojAziGhp → F1eSPc1 pattern repeated for CRM

events.legal_significance: The critical loading event establishing zero-cost basis position for March 2026 coordinated dump. 8eVZa7 received CRM for FREE via internal transfers, then sold back to market in March 2026 for real SOL. This is the DojAziGhp distribution pattern applied to a new token.
events.operational_note: 8eVZa7 now fully loaded and armed for March extraction. Also holds PBTC (~$7,770) proving participation in SHIFT insider payout ring - the membership card for SOSANA criminal enterprise.

events.title: Downstream Distribution: 8eVZa7 → 7abBmGf4
events.description: Same day as loading completion, 8eVZa7 begins distribution to satellite wallet 7abBmGf4, transferring 20M CRM. This wallet will later route CRM back into the feeder network via HxyXAE1P hub in February-March 2026.
events.legal_significance: Distribution to satellite wallet for later routing back into dump infrastructure

key_achievements_for_network: Successfully suppressed CRM price at launch via 41M mega-dump (Dec 8)
Loaded 8eVZa7 with 20M+ CRM at zero cost (Dec 28-31)
monthly_summary.cost_to_network: ~$0 (all acquisitions via free internal transfers or pre-launch allocation)
monthly_summary.extraction_ready: 20M+ CRM loaded into 8eVZa7 for March 2026 dump

dec_8_pattern.name: Crash and Load
dec_8_pattern.description: ARM A dumps to suppress price → ARM B accumulates at suppressed price

dec_28_31_pattern.name: Mechanized Feeder Loading
dec_28_31_pattern.description: 30+ batch transfers at 0.002 SOL dust fees - NOT market buys
dec_28_31_pattern.methodology: Same pattern as DojAziGhp SHIFT distributions

primary_violations.description: Wire Fraud - using electronic transfers to execute pump-dump-reload scheme
primary_violations.evidence: Dec 8 coordinated dump/reload; Dec 28-31 mechanized loading

primary_violations.description: Market Manipulation - creating artificial price movements for profit
primary_violations.evidence: Dec 8 mega-dump crashed price; reload at suppressed price 67 min later

primary_violations.description: SEC Rule 10b-5 - Employment of manipulative deceptive devices
primary_violations.evidence: Wash trading pattern between coordinated wallets

racketeering_elements.pattern: Enterprise operated through distinct phases: Phase 1 (Dec 2025) = Pre-positioning/Loading; Phase 2 (Mar 2026) = Coordinated Extraction
racketeering_elements.continuity: Same feeder methodology (HLnpSz9h) used across multiple months
racketeering_elements.enterprise: Multiple wallets coordinated via central feeder infrastructure

connections_to_other_phases.predecessor: November 2025 - BKLBtcJQJ2 received 36.7M CRM free allocation (Nov 27)

successor_march_2026.loading_march_18: HLnpSz9h loads CyhJT3o8 with 12.1M CRM via 20 automated transfers
successor_march_2026.execution_march_26: 8eVZa7 dumps 762K CRM; HLnpSz9h dumps 140K CRM; network dump ~$499

infrastructure_reuse.same_feeder: HLnpSz9h used for both Dec 2025 loading AND March 2026 loading
infrastructure_reuse.same_recipient_type: 8eVZa7 (Dec 2025) and CyhJT3o8 (Mar 2026) both loaded by same feeder
infrastructure_reuse.same_methodology: 0.002 SOL dust transfers = free internal loading

forensic_significance: December 2025 represents the MANIPULATION PHASE - where the network established zero-cost positions through free internal transfers and suppressed market price through coordinated dumping. This set up the March 2026 EXTRACTION PHASE where loaded inventory was dumped back to market for real SOL.
investigator_notes: The Dec 8 mega-dump was the 'birth suppression event' - prevented CRM from organic price discovery
The Dec 28-31 loading established the 'loaded weapon' 8eVZa7 that would be used in March 2026
Pattern shows deliberate two-phase operation: Phase 1 = Load/Suppress; Phase 2 = Extract
8eVZa7 holding PBTC ($7,770) proves connection to SOSANA insider payout network
All acquisitions at zero cost basis - evidence of insider allocation rather than organic investment

metadata.confidence_level: 97% EXTREME - Direct on-chain verification of all critical transactions
